audit_items.proof_trace: priceMultiplier = startingPM - floor((startingPM - endingPM) * elapsedTime / duration) is monotonically non-increasing because floor() is non-decreasing in elapsedTime; mulDiv (floor division) ensures the subtracted term grows with time. The subsequent mulWadUp and mulDivUp operations preserve non-increasing order: ceil(A*x) is non-decreasing in x, so smaller priceMultiplier yields smaller or equal output. Invariant startingPM >= endingPM is enforced at L653.
